home.hero_subtitle: TripTrack quietly records every trip and turns it into a visual diary — routes, photos, stats, all on your phone.
home.problem_timeline_desc: In 2025 Google wiped years of location history. Millions lost their travel memories overnight.
home.problem_photos_desc: You scroll your camera roll thinking 'where was that road?' Photos capture stops, not the drive itself.
home.problem_noapp_desc: Polarsteps is for vacations. MileIQ is for mileage. There's nothing for everyday drives and weekend road trips.
home.step1_desc: One tap before you drive. Or let it start automatically.
home.step2_desc: It runs on your Lock Screen. Use your navigator — we keep recording.
home.step3_desc: Route, photos, stats — every drive becomes a memory you can revisit.
home.rating: 5.0 on the App Store · 60+ trips recorded
home.review1: "Приложение огонь. Люблю разные трекеры. Этот показался интересным, слежу за ним теперь."

features.hero_subtitle: Everything you need to remember your drives — from daily commutes to cross-country road trips.
features.records_desc: Runs quietly in the background. Speed, distance, elevation — all captured without killing your battery.
features.photos_desc: Pin memories to the exact spot on your route where they happened.
features.stats_desc: See your driving habits, favorite routes, and personal records.
features.fog_desc: Uncover the map like a video game. Every kilometer reveals new territory. See where you've been — and what's left.
features.private_desc: Everything stays on your phone. No cloud. No account needed.
features.gamification_desc: Earn badges, grow your driver profile, and unlock achievements for every road trip milestone.
features.gamification_note: 30 driver levels · 10 vehicle stickers · Hidden achievements

about.story_p1: I started building TripTrack after Google killed years of my location history in early 2025. I wanted to look back at that spontaneous weekend trip to the mountains, the scenic coastal drive I took last summer, or the route I drove cross-country.
about.story_p2: There were apps for athletes. Apps for vacation planning. But nothing for regular people who just drive every day and want to remember where they've been. So I built the road album I always wished I had.
about.private_desc: Your data stays on your phone. No cloud, no servers, no ads. TripTrack works fully offline. I never see your routes.
about.indie_desc: No VC funding, no data harvesting. Just one developer building something he actually uses every day.

download.hero_subtitle: Get TripTrack free on the App Store. No account, no subscription. Just drive.

footer.made_with: Made with ❤️ and 71,000 km behind the wheel
